case_title: ERICK CASTRO VS. GERALD K DOWD

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DOWD, GERALD K
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 - SERVED SEP-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOWD, GERALD K
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY CASTRO, ERICK AS TO DEFENDANT DOWD, GERALD K ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, ERICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOWD, GERALD K $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,235.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $800.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ERICK CASTRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GERALD DOWD IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FRANCINE PERKINS, APARTMENT BUILDING MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT DOWD, GERALD K
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
